title: Typing practice
drDigitalIntro:
Let's put it all together — letters, numbers, spaces, Shift, and Caps Lock.
• Type the sentence exactly as shown.
• Include the capital letters and commas.

playgroundTask.instructions: Open the Mail app, click the pencil to compose a new email, and type this message exactly: "Hi Doctor Digital! Are you having a good day today? Thanks for teaching me like 9,003,751 new things!" Then click Send.
playgroundTask.subject: Hi Dr. Digital!
playgroundTask.requiredBody: Hi Doctor Digital! Are you having a good day today? Thanks for teaching me like 9,003,751 new things!

drDigitalSuccess: Perfect typing! Capitals, numbers, punctuation — you nailed every part.
drDigitalHint: Match it exactly: capital H, D, and D, the commas inside 9,003,751, and the ! and ? marks. Use Shift for the capitals and symbols.
